data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding AI-generated parameters, but the evidence does not provide any concrete results or traces from the simulation. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should either be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, yet there is no supporting evidence to indicate that this validation was successfully executed or documented. Therefore, the step is inconclusive due to a lack of deterministically captured outcomes.
gaps: No evidence confirming the outcome of the persona scenario simulation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Capture simulation results
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Document the results of the persona scenario simulation to confirm expected behavior.
